name: build-component-showcase-page
description: PROP API REFERENCE ONLY — not a template for new pages. Creates a full component showcase page demonstrating every individual prop on all 12 SDC components: color palette, typographic scale, button matrix, grid layouts, card variants, accordion, blockquote, images, wrapper/spacing demos, and reference tables. Uses manual Bootstrap utility props (text_color, display_size, bg_color, etc.) intentionally to document what's available. For building new pages, use the preset-based scripts (canvas-build-page, build-demo-page) instead.
preconditions: Basic page content type exists with field_canvas_body
ContentTemplate node.page.full exists and is enabled
